title: DirtExtras
description: DirtExtras adds new dirt, coarse dirt and gravel decorations to Minecraft, all obtainable in survival through crafting.
body:
## Expand your possibilities with dirt.

![PotHole in a Street](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1232/840/screenshot-2025-06-27-112635-png.png)

### More Dirt Variants

![All new Dirt Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUmlJzLv/images/1e505cf6f3d5a77301ecbab4ded7a3eea6d5ced2.png)

### New Dirt Brick Decorations

![All new Dirt Brick Variantions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUmlJzLv/images/8ac81583b277933a4779541e494040b7816ffa8f.png)

### More Coarse Dirt Variants

![All new Coarse Dirt Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUmlJzLv/images/73d4d11470634945c6effdd8f1e9f547f668b2c2.png)

### More Gravel Variants

![All new Gravel Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUmlJzLv/images/00abfeff70ad7086f46af0e3de7e37c5655d6be3.png)

### More Sand Variants

![All new Sand Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUmlJzLv/images/5b7b7c85c91c728be15b04a9781026de8a84f901.png)

**Survival Friendly, all Blocks are obtainable in Survival**
